# -----------------------------------------
# 1. Imports
# -----------------------------------------
from pyspark.sql.functions import *

# -----------------------------------------
# 2. ADLS Storage details
# -----------------------------------------
storage_account = "sadevenvdatamart"
container = "adlsgen2"

flights_path = f"abfss://{container}@{storage_account}.dfs.core.windows.net/preintegration/flights"
booking_path = f"abfss://{container}@{storage_account}.dfs.core.windows.net/preintegration/booking"

# -----------------------------------------
# 3. SQL Server connection details
# -----------------------------------------
server = "sqlserver-datahub.database.windows.net"
database = "sqldb"
username = "sqladmin-datahub"
password = "Amma@143"

jdbc_url = f"jdbc:sqlserver://{server}:1433;database={database};encrypt=true;trustServerCertificate=false;hostNameInCertificate=*.database.windows.net;loginTimeout=30"

connection_properties = {
    "user": username,
    "password": password,
    "driver": "com.microsoft.sqlserver.jdbc.SQLServerDriver"
}

# -----------------------------------------
# 4. Read Flights Data from ADLS
# -----------------------------------------
df_flights = spark.read.format("parquet").load(flights_path)

# -----------------------------------------
# 5. Read Booking Data from ADLS
# -----------------------------------------
df_booking = spark.read.format("parquet").load(booking_path)

# Optional preview
display(df_flights)
display(df_booking)

# Reduce partitions to avoid SQL overload
df_flights = df_flights.repartition(1)
df_booking = df_booking.repartition(1)

# -----------------------------------------
# 6. Write Flights → STG Table
# -----------------------------------------
df_flights.write \
    .mode("overwrite") \
    .jdbc(
        url=jdbc_url,
        table="stg_flights",
        properties=connection_properties
    )

print("Flights loaded into STG table")

# -----------------------------------------
# 7. Write Booking → STG Table
# -----------------------------------------
df_booking.write \
    .mode("overwrite") \
    .jdbc(
        url=jdbc_url,
        table="stg_booking",
        properties=connection_properties
    )

print("Booking loaded into STG table")
